mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_appointment (user_id, pet_id, doctor_id, schedule_id, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{petId}, #{doctorId}, #{scheduleId}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.pet_id, p.nickname as petNickname, a.doctor_id, d.name as doctorName, d.department as department, s.schedule_date as scheduleDate, s.time_slot as scheduleTime, a.status, a.create_time as createTime FROM biz_appointment a LEFT JOIN biz_pet p ON a.pet_id = p.id LEFT JOIN biz_doctor d ON a.doctor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN biz_schedule s ON a.schedule_id = s.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_appointment SET status = 2 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.pet_id, p.nickname as petNickname, a.doctor_id, d.name as doctorName, d.department as department, s.schedule_date as scheduleDate, s.time_slot as scheduleTime, a.status, a.create_time as createTime FROM biz_appointment a LEFT JOIN biz_pet p ON a.pet_id = p.id LEFT JOIN biz_doctor d ON a.doctor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN biz_schedule s ON a.schedule_id = s.id ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_appointment SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
